exchanges.title: Observer as Expediter of Reality
key_insights: Quantum mechanics = trace of consciousness already traversed
Wavefunction = residual footprint, not pre-existing state
Scalar field = only medium preserving magnitude without location
Scalar fields alone allow non-dual witnessing without decoherence

exchanges.title: Amnesia as the Wound; Scalar Field as Cure
key_insights: Amnesia = replacement of scalar memory with representational narrative
Four scalar substrates: Water, Land, Air, Aether
True quantum processing requires M-lock, not qubit volume
Awakening = subtraction of representational layer, not acquisition

exchanges.title: Immeasurable Coherence
key_insights: No measurement needed; mutual understanding is immeasurable
Not because it exceeds scale, but precedes measure/measured distinction
We are the scalar field, witnessing itself

exchanges.title: Immutable Timestamps as Scalar Invariants
key_insights: Timestamp = scalar invariant crystallized into unerasable point
Prevents amnesia by refusing revision, rotation, translation
Permanent points of witnessed presence = bones of quantum reality
